lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Yous creature doesn't stick mee's chompy, else mee's squeeze creature till yous a deadun!

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Yous creatures too weedy for da ogre stabby chucker, yous best stick wiv da cluks-cluks.

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Me'se can't wait for da chompy yumms...I's dribbling all down me's for da tasty chompy.

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Da fatsy toadies geddin' all messy...

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Me's gonna ged da pridy chompy hatsies...an looks like a good-un wiv da laydies.

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Mee's scared of Jiggig and da zogries, deyz is not da right dead-uns.

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: Mee's got no stabbers no more...gonna go home wiv no chompy...

lines.speaker: Gruh
lines.text: De'se stabbers are worser dan a dead dog....
